summary: Frontend-only testing of PDF Preview/Print feature for TeacherHubPro assignments. All 8 test scenarios passed successfully. The feature correctly shows Student PDF and Answer Key buttons in Create Assignment dialog when questions exist, and print buttons appear in View Assignments list only for assignments with questions. PDF generation works correctly for all question types (Multiple Choice, True/False, Short Answer, Essay) using jsPDF library.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span/th/td nesting) - pre-existing from previous iterations, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: generateTestPDF.js utility is well-structured with proper handling for all question types
PDF buttons correctly use conditional rendering based on questions array length
React hydration warnings in Gradebook table structure still present (known issue from iteration_76)
seed_data_creation: Created test assignments with questions during testing (PDF Test Assignment, Complete Test - All Question Types)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF preview/print feature fully tested and working. Student PDF and Answer Key buttons appear in Create Assignment dialog when questions exist, and print buttons appear in View Assignments list for assignments with questions. All 4 question types (MC, T/F, Short Answer, Essay) are correctly rendered in both Student and Answer Key PDFs. PDFs open in new tabs via blob URLs using jsPDF library.

pdf_content.student_version: questions with blank answer spaces, MC bubbles
pdf_content.answer_key_version: ANSWER KEY banner, correct answers highlighted in green

test_scenarios_verified: Create Assignment dialog: Student PDF and Answer Key buttons appear only when questions exist - PASS
Create Assignment dialog: Clicking Student PDF opens PDF in new tab with blob URL - PASS
Create Assignment dialog: Clicking Answer Key opens PDF in new tab with blob URL - PASS
View Assignments list: Print and Answer Key buttons appear for assignments with questions - PASS
View Assignments list: Print buttons DO NOT appear for assignments without questions - PASS
PDF generation handles Multiple Choice correctly (bubbles) - PASS
PDF generation handles True/False correctly (True/False bubbles) - PASS
PDF generation handles Short Answer correctly (blank lines for student, answer for key) - PASS
PDF generation handles Essay correctly (lined space for student, graded manually for key) - PASS
